coreMeaning: a person whose behavior and success others admire and want to copy
coreImage: 一个人站在前面发光，旁边有人悄悄模仿他的每个动作
chineseMeaning: 榜样；楷模；值得效仿的人
meaning: a person whose behavior and success others admire and want to copy
fable: 有只小鸭子觉得自己走路太笨，于是它宣布：我要以火烈鸟为 role model。它开始每天单腿站立，把羽毛染成粉红色，学着昂首阔步。三个月后，它没有变成火烈鸟，但却成了鸭群里姿态最优雅、最自信的一只。大家都来问它：你是怎么做到的？它说：我选了一个比我优秀很多的 role model，然后一直努力追。
moral: role model 不是让你变成别人，而是借助仰望的力量，让自己变得更好。
memoryHook: role（角色）+ model（模型/样板）→ 生活剧本里你想扮演的那个角色的样板 → role model = 榜样
anchorSentence: He became my role model because he always delivered clean code and handled feedback with grace.
collocations: be a role model for someone
serve as / act as a role model
look up to someone as a role model
personalExample: My tech lead serves as a role model for me — not just in coding skills, but in how he communicates clearly under pressure.
notes: role model vs mentor: mentor actively guides you; role model is someone you admire and imitate, not necessarily someone who knows you. role model vs idol: idol implies worship; role model emphasizes behavior worth copying. Written as two separate words, no hyphen.
recallQuestions: 那只把火烈鸟当模仿目标、最终变成最优雅小鸭子的故事，对应哪个英文词组？
role model 和 mentor 最核心的区别是什么？
用 role model 写一句和你的工作、学习或成长经历有关的英文句子。
